Variables.Name: bApplyEQ
Variables.Description: Whether to apply the EQ effect

Variables.Name: SoundClassEffects
Variables.Description: Array of changes to be applied to groups.

Variables.Name: InitialDelay
Variables.Description: Initial delay in seconds before the the mix is applied.

Variables.Name: FadeInTime
Variables.Description: Time taken in seconds for the mix to fade in.

Variables.Name: Duration
Variables.Description: Duration of mix, negative means it will be applied until another mix is set.

Variables.Name: FadeOutTime
Variables.Description: Time taken in seconds for the mix to fade out.

Variables.Name: bChanged
Variables.Description: Transient property used to trigger real-time updates of the active EQ filter for editor previewing
